institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Child Development & Family Studies — Family Relations
programDescription: The Family Relations concentration prepares students to work with families across the lifespan in therapeutic, educational, and community settings. Coursework covers family dynamics, human development, counseling theory, and program administration. Graduates pursue careers in family services, social work, counseling, and community-based organizations supporting family well-being.

topEmployers: NC Department of Health & Human Services
certifications: Licensed Marriage & Family Therapist (LMFT) — requires graduate degree
careerOutlook.outlook: Family services professionals are in high demand as communities face growing needs for mental health support, family strengthening, and crisis intervention. Growth rate of 15% far exceeds the national average for all occupations.
